items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific feature 'Mobile signature capture (finger/stylus on screen)', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for mobile signature capture, but it does not provide any concrete API reads or persisted state checks to confirm its implementation. Therefore, the evidence is inconclusive regarding whether this requirement is satisfied.
